license_notes: Repository is MIT-licensed; bundled Big Buck Bunny source footage is CC BY 3.0 per upstream LICENSE.md.
notes: Both files are H.264/AAC MP4 samples from the same public repository.
The pair keeps content constant while varying encode characteristics, which is useful for the first extraction/comparison baseline.

inputs.name: bbb_480p_30s
inputs.notes: 30 second Big Buck Bunny clip at 480p.

inputs.name: bbb_1080p_30s
inputs.notes: 30 second Big Buck Bunny clip at 1080p.
